```html
                <div class="form-section-title">
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 2C5.8 2 4 3.8 4 6c0 3 4 8 4 8s4-5 4-8c0-2.2-1.8-4-4-4z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="8" cy="6" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
                  Trip Details
                </div>
                <div class="form-grid form-grid-3">
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="tourType">Tour Type</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="text" id="tourType" name="tour_type" placeholder="e.g. Gorilla Safari, Wildlife">
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="travelStartDate">Travel Start Date</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="date" id="travelStartDate" name="travel_start_date">
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="travelEndDate">Travel End Date</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="date" id="travelEndDate" name="travel_end_date">
                    <span class="form-error hidden" id="dateRangeError">End date must be after start date</span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="durationDays">Duration (days)</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="number" id="durationDays" name="duration_days" min="1" placeholder="Enter or auto-calculate from dates">
                    <span class="form-hint">Auto-calc from dates</span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="pax">Pax <span class="required">*</span></label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pax" name="pax" min="1" max="50" value="2" required>
                    <span class="form-error hidden" id="paxError">Pax must be between 1 and 50</span>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="budgetRange">Budget Range</label>
                    <select class="form-control" id="budgetRange" name="budget_range">
                      <option value="">— Select —</option>
                      <option value="budget">Budget</option>
                      <option value="mid_range">Mid-Range</option>
                      <option value="premium">Premium</option>
                      <option value="luxury">Luxury</option>
                    </select>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group mb-5" style="margin-top: var(--space-4);">
                  <label class="form-label">Interests</label>
                  <div class="checkbox-group" id="interestsCheckboxes"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group mb-5">
                  <label class="form-label" for="destinationsInput">Destinations Requested</label>
                  <div class="tag-input-wrap" id="destinationsTagWrap">
                    <div class="tag-input-tags" id="destinationsTags"></div>
                    <input class="tag-input-field" type="text" id="destinationsInput" placeholder="Type or select destination…" list="destinationsList" autocomplete="off">
                  </div>
                  <input type="hidden" id="destinationsRequested" name="destinations_requested">
                  <datalist id="destinationsList">
                    <!-- MINOR-15: Known Uganda/Rwanda parks & destinations from TRVE itinerary library -->
                    <option value="Bwindi Impenetrable NP">
                    <option value="Mgahinga Gorilla NP">
                    <option value="Kibale NP">
                    <option value="Queen Elizabeth NP">
                    <option value="Murchison Falls NP">
                    <option value="Kidepo Valley NP">
                    <option value="Lake Mburo NP">
                    <option value="Semuliki NP">
                    <option value="Rwenzori Mountains NP">
                    <option value="Mt Elgon NP">
                    <option value="Ziwa Rhino Sanctuary">
                    <option value="Entebbe">
                    <option value="Kampala">
                    <option value="Jinja">
                    <option value="Ssese Islands">
                    <option value="Lake Bunyonyi">
                    <option value="Sipi Falls">
                    <option value="Fort Portal">
                    <option value="Volcanoes NP (Rwanda)">
                    <option value="Nyungwe Forest NP (Rwanda)">
                    <option value="Akagera NP (Rwanda)">
                    <option value="Kigali">
                    <option value="Ishasha (Tree Lions)">
                    <option value="Bigodi Wetland">
                    <option value="Kazinga Channel">
                    <option value="Budongo Forest">
                  </datalist>
                  <span class="form-hint">Select from the list or type a custom destination and press Enter</span>
                </div>

                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label" for="specialRequests">Special Requests</label>
                  <textarea class="form-control" id="specialRequests" name="special_requests" rows="3" placeholder="Dietary requirements, accessibility needs, special occasions…"></textarea>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Form Actions -->
              <div class="flex items-center gap-3" style="justify-content: flex-end; padding-top: var(--space-4); border-top: 1px solid var(--surface-border);">
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary" id="enquiryReset">Reset</button>
                <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg" id="enquirySubmit">
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 3v10M3 8l5 5 5-5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                  Submit Enquiry
                </button>
              </div>

            </form>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 2: PIPELINE KANBAN BOARD
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-pipeline" aria-label="Pipeline Board">
        <!-- Phase 3: Tasks due today widget -->
        <div id="dueTodayWidget" style="display:none;padding:8px 0 4px;margin-bottom:4px">
          <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px">
            <span style="font-size:11px;color:var(--text-muted);white-space:nowrap;font-weight:600">Due today</span>
            <div id="dueTodayChips" style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:nowrap"></div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Stats row -->
        <div class="stats-row" id="pipelineStats" aria-live="polite">
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Total Enquiries</div><div class="stat-value skeleton skeleton-title">&nbsp;</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Active Quotes</div><div class="stat-value skeleton skeleton-title">&nbsp;</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Confirmed</div><div class="stat-value skeleton skeleton-title">&nbsp;</div></div>
          <div class="stat-card"><div class="stat-label">Completed</div><div class="stat-value skeleton skeleton-title">&nbsp;</div></div>
        </div>

        <!-- FX Exposure Panel — rendered by renderFxExposurePanel() -->
        <div id="fxExposurePanel"></div>

        <!-- Toolbar -->
        <div class="pipeline-toolbar">
          <div class="search-input-wrap">
            <svg width="15" height="15" viewBox="0 0 15 15" fill="none"><circle cx="6.5" cy="6.5" r="5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M10.5 10.5l3 3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
            <input class="form-control" type="search" id="pipelineSearch" placeholder="Search by name or ref…" style="height: 36px;">
          </div>
          <select class="form-control sort-select" id="pipelineSort" style="height: 36px; width: auto;">
            <option value="inquiry_date">Sort: Inquiry Date</option>
            <option value="travel_start_date">Sort: Travel Date</option>
            <option value="client_name">Sort: Client Name</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="exportCsvBtn" title="Export pipeline to CSV">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M7 1v8M4 6l3 3 3-3M2 11h10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
            Export CSV
          </button>
          <div class="filter-pills" id="pipelineFilters">
            <div class="pill active" data-status="all">All</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="New_Inquiry">New</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="Active_Quote">Active Quote</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="Confirmed">Confirmed</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="In_Progress">In Progress</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="Completed">Completed</div>
            <div class="pill" data-status="Cancelled">Cancelled</div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Kanban Board -->
        <!-- MINOR-36: aria-live for dynamic updates -->
        <div class="kanban-board" id="kanbanBoard" role="region" aria-label="Kanban pipeline board" aria-live="polite"></div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 3: ITINERARY MATCHING PANEL
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-curation" aria-label="Itinerary Matching">
        <div class="curation-layout">
          <!-- Left: Input Panel -->
          <div>
            <!-- From Enquiry -->
            <div class="curation-from-enquiry card mb-5">
              <div class="card-header" style="padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);">
                <span class="card-title" style="font-size: var(--text-base);">Match from Enquiry</span>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body" style="padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);">
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curationEnquirySelect">Select Enquiry</label>
                  <select class="form-control" id="curationEnquirySelect">
                    <option value="">— Choose enquiry —</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <button class="btn btn-gold w-full" id="btnRunCurationFromEnquiry" disabled>
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 1.5l1.8 5.2H15l-4.4 3.2 1.7 5.2L8 12.2l-4.3 2.9 1.7-5.2L1 6.7h5.2L8 1.5z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                  Find Best Itineraries
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Manual Matching -->
            <div class="card">
              <div class="card-header" style="padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);">
                <span class="card-title" style="font-size: var(--text-base);">Manual Parameters</span>
              </div>
              <div class="card-body" style="padding: var(--space-4) var(--space-5);">
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curDuration">Duration (days)</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="number" id="curDuration" min="1" placeholder="7">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curBudget">Budget Tier</label>
                  <select class="form-control" id="curBudget">
                    <option value="">— Any —</option>
                    <option value="budget">Budget</option>
                    <option value="mid_range">Mid-Range</option>
                    <option value="premium">Premium</option>
                    <option value="luxury">Luxury</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curNationality">Nationality Tier</label>
                  <select class="form-control" id="curNationality">
                    <option value="FNR">FNR</option>
                    <option value="FR">FR</option>
                    <option value="ROA">ROA</option>
                    <option value="EAC">EAC</option>
                    <option value="Ugandan">Ugandan</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curPax">Pax</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="number" id="curPax" min="1" value="2">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label">Interests</label>
                  <div class="checkbox-group" id="curationInterestsCheckboxes"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group mb-4">
                  <label class="form-label" for="curDestinations">Destinations</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="text" id="curDestinations" placeholder="e.g. Bwindi, Kibale">
                </div>
                <button class="btn btn-primary w-full" id="btnRunManualCuration">
                  <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 1.5l1.8 5.2H15l-4.4 3.2 1.7 5.2L8 12.2l-4.3 2.9 1.7-5.2L1 6.7h5.2L8 1.5z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                  Find Matching Itineraries
                </button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Right: Results Panel -->
          <div>
            <div id="curationResults" aria-live="polite">
              <!-- Default state -->
              <div class="empty-state" id="curationEmptyState">
                <div class="empty-icon">
                  <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><path d="M14 3l3 8.5H25l-7 5.1 2.7 8.4L14 20l-6.7 5 2.7-8.4L3 11.5h8L14 3z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                </div>
                <div class="empty-title">Find Matching Itineraries</div>
                <div class="empty-text">Select an enquiry or enter manual parameters to get ranked itinerary suggestions from TRVE's library.</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Approval Panel (shown after selection) -->
            <div class="approval-panel hidden" id="approvalPanel">
              <div class="approval-title">
                <svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><path d="M9 1.5l2 6H17l-5 3.6 1.9 6L9 13.4l-4.9 3.7 1.9-6L1 7.5h6l2-6z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                Guide Approval Required
              </div>
              <div class="form-group mb-4">
                <label class="form-label">Selected Itinerary</label>
                <div id="approvalSelectedName" class="font-semibold" style="font-size: var(--text-base);"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group mb-4">
                <label class="form-label" for="approvedBy">Approved By <span class="required">*</span></label>
                <select class="form-control" id="approvedBy">
                  <option value="">— Select guide —</option>
                  <option value="Desire">Desire</option>
                  <option value="Belinda">Belinda</option>
                  <option value="Robert">Robert</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group mb-4">
                <label class="form-label" for="approvalNotes">Notes</label>
                <textarea class="form-control" id="approvalNotes" rows="3" placeholder="Any notes about the selected itinerary…"></textarea>
              </div>
              <button class="btn btn-gold w-full btn-lg" id="btnApproveItinerary">
                <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M3 8l4 4 6-7" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                Approve Itinerary
              </button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 4: PRICING CALCULATOR
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-pricing" aria-label="Pricing Calculator">
        <div class="pricing-layout">
          <!-- Left: Form -->
          <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
              <span class="card-title">Pricing Inputs</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body">
              <form id="pricingForm" novalidate>

                <!-- Basic -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1.5" y="2.5" width="13" height="11" rx="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M1.5 6.5h13" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
                    Basic Details
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-grid form-grid-2">
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingItinerary">Itinerary (optional)</label>
                      <select class="form-control" id="pricingItinerary">
                        <option value="">— Manual entry —</option>
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingNationality">Nationality Tier <span class="required">*</span></label>
                      <select class="form-control" id="pricingNationality" required>
                        <option value="">— Select nationality tier —</option>
                        <option value="FNR">FNR — Foreign Non-Resident</option>
                        <option value="FR">FR — Foreign Resident</option>
                        <option value="ROA">ROA — Rest of Africa</option>
                        <option value="EAC">EAC — East African Community</option>
                        <option value="Ugandan">Ugandan</option>
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingAdults">Adults</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pricingAdults" min="1" value="2">
                      <span class="form-hint">Full permit &amp; room rate applies</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingChildren">Children (under 15)</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pricingChildren" min="0" value="0">
                      <span class="form-hint">50% room rate · UWA rules apply for permits</span>
                      <div id="childAgesSection" style="display:none;margin-top:6px"></div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingDays">Duration (days)</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pricingDays" min="1" value=""
                        placeholder="e.g. 7" title="Auto-calculated when both travel dates are set.">
                      <span class="form-hint" id="pricingDaysNightsHint" style="display:none"></span>
                    </div>
                    <!-- T2: Fuel Cost Estimate -->
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingFuelVehicleType">Vehicle Type <span style="font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted)">(fuel)</span></label>
                      <select class="form-control" id="pricingFuelVehicleType">
                        <option value="">— No fuel estimate —</option>
                        <option value="landcruiser">Land Cruiser (14 L/100km)</option>
                        <option value="minivan">Minivan / Hiace (11 L/100km)</option>
                        <option value="coaster">Coaster Bus (21 L/100km)</option>
                        <option value="selfdrive">Self Drive 4x4 (11 L/100km)</option>
                      </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group" id="fuelKmGroup" style="display:none">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingFuelRouteKm">Estimated Route (km)</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pricingFuelRouteKm" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 600">
                      <span class="form-hint">Common: Murchison 600 · Bwindi 1,080 · QENP 800 · Kibale 620 · Kidepo 1,360 · Rwanda 1,200</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group" id="fuelPriceGroup" style="display:none">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingFuelPriceUgx">Diesel Price (UGX/L)</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="pricingFuelPriceUgx" min="0" value="4690">
                      <span class="form-hint">Current: UGX 4,690/L (Feb 2026). Update as market changes.</span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingTravelStartDate">Travel Start Date</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="date" id="pricingTravelStartDate">
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingTravelEndDate">Travel End Date</label>
                      <input class="form-control" type="date" id="pricingTravelEndDate">
                      <span class="form-hint" id="pricingDateRangeHint" style="display:none"></span>
                    </div>
                    <div class="form-group">
                      <label class="form-label" for="pricingCommissionType">Commission Type</label>
                      <select class="form-control" id="pricingCommissionType">
                        <option value="">— None (0%) —</option>
                        <option value="standard">Standard (markup)</option>
                        <option value="b2b">B2B (~5.6%)</option>
                        <option value="hornbill">Hornbill (vehicle hire)</option>
                      </select>
                      <span class="text-xs text-muted" id="commissionHint" style="margin-top:2px;display:block">Rate applied per Operations Hub config</span>
                    </div>
                    <!-- MINOR-33: Insurance with rate/provider info -->
                    <div class="form-group" style="padding-top:24px">
                      <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px">
                        <input type="checkbox" id="pricingIncludeInsurance" style="width:16px;height:16px;cursor:pointer">
                        <label class="form-label" for="pricingIncludeInsurance" style="margin:0;cursor:pointer">Include Travel Insurance</label>
                      </div>
                      <span class="form-hint" style="margin-top:4px;display:block">Approx. $8–12/person/day · Coverage: medical evacuation, trip cancellation, baggage. Provider configured via backend.</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <!-- Pricing Buffers -->
                <div class="buffer-controls" id="bufferControls">
                  <span style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted)">Price Buffers:</span>
                  <label class="buffer-control-item">
                    <span>Fuel buffer</span>
                    <input type="number" id="fuelBufferInput" value="5" min="0" max="30" step="0.5"> %
                  </label>
                  <label class="buffer-control-item">
                    <span>FX buffer</span>
                    <input type="number" id="fxBufferInput" value="3" min="0" max="20" step="0.5"> %
                  </label>
                  <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="applyBuffersBtn">Apply</button>
                  <span style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto">
                    <em>Buffers protect against fuel &amp; currency volatility</em>
                  </span>
                </div>

                <!-- Guest Roster (auto-generated from pax count) -->
                <div id="pricingGuestRoster" style="display:none" class="form-section">
                  <!-- Populated by renderGuestRoster() -->
                </div>

                <!-- Accommodation -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M2 13V8l6-5 6 5v5H2z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><rect x="5.5" y="9.5" width="2.5" height="3.5" rx=".5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><rect x="8" y="9.5" width="2.5" height="3.5" rx=".5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/></svg>
                    Accommodation
                    <span id="accomDateBar" style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:8px"></span>
                  </div>
                  <div id="accomUndoRedoBar" style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-bottom:8px">
                    <button type="button" id="accomUndoBtn" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" disabled
                      onclick="window.TRVE._accomUndo()" title="Undo last room change (Ctrl+Z)">
                      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none"><path d="M2 5.5l3-3v2h3a3 3 0 010 6H4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                      Undo
                    </button>
                    <button type="button" id="accomRedoBtn" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" disabled
                      onclick="window.TRVE._accomRedo()" title="Redo (Ctrl+Y)">
                      <svg width="11" height="11" viewBox="0 0 11 11" fill="none"><path d="M9 5.5l-3-3v2H3a3 3 0 000 6h4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                      Redo
                    </button>
                    <span id="accomHistoryHint" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)"></span>
                  </div>
                  <div id="lodgeItems">
                    <!-- Lodge rows injected by JS -->
                  </div>
                  <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="btnAddLodge">
                    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><path d="M6.5 2v9M2 6.5h9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                    Add Lodge
                  </button>

                  <!-- Staff Accommodation Section -->
                  <div id="staffAccomSection" style="display:none;margin-top:var(--space-4);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:var(--space-3)">
                    <div style="font-size:var(--text-sm);font-weight:700;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-2);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px">
                      <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M7 1a3 3 0 110 6A3 3 0 017 1zM2 13c0-2.761 2.239-5 5-5s5 2.239 5 5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                      Operational Staff Accommodation
                    </div>
                    <div id="staffRoomItems"></div>
                  </div>

                  <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="btnAddStaffRoom" style="margin-top:var(--space-2)">
                    <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><path d="M6.5 2v9M2 6.5h9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                    Add Staff Room
                  </button>

                  <!-- Accommodation Pricing Summary -->
                  <div id="accomPricingSummary" style="display:none;margin-top:var(--space-4);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:var(--space-3)"></div>
                </div>

                <!-- Transport (optional explicit add-ons) -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="5" width="14" height="7" rx="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><circle cx="4.5" cy="12" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><circle cx="11.5" cy="12" r="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><path d="M1 8h14M5 5V3h6v2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                    Transport
                    <span style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:400;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:6px">optional add-ons only — not auto-inserted</span>
                  </div>
                  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <select id="vehicleDropdown" class="form-control" style="flex:1;min-width:180px">
                      <!-- Populated by JS from VEHICLE_TYPES -->
                    </select>
                    <label style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;white-space:nowrap">
                      Days:
                      <input type="number" id="vehicleDaysInput" class="form-control" min="1" value="6" style="width:52px;height:32px;font-size:var(--text-xs);padding:2px 6px">
                    </label>
                    <button type="button" id="btnAddVehicle" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Add</button>
                  </div>
                  <div id="vehicleDropdownHint" style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">Select a vehicle type then click Add</div>
                  <div id="vehicleItems">
                    <!-- Added vehicle rows injected by JS -->
                  </div>
                  <span class="form-hint">Each entry is a separate transport cost. Rate includes driver. Fuel buffer from config is applied.</span>
                </div>

                <!-- Permits -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 1.5l1.8 5.2H15l-4.4 3.2 1.7 5.2L8 12.2l-4.3 2.9 1.7-5.2L1 6.7h5.2L8 1.5z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                    Permits &amp; Park Entry
                  </div>
                  <div id="permitsSection">
                    <!-- MAJOR-13: UWA-compliant permit maximums -->
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitGorillauganda">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_gorilla_uganda" value="gorilla_tracking_uganda">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="gorilla_tracking_uganda">Gorilla Tracking (Uganda) — $800</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_gorilla_uganda" value="1" min="1" max="8" data-uwa-max="8" title="Max 8 per gorilla family per UWA allocation">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitGorillaHabituation">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_gorilla_habituation" value="gorilla_habituation_uganda">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="gorilla_habituation_uganda">Gorilla Habituation (Uganda) — $1,500</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_gorilla_habituation" value="1" min="1" max="4" data-uwa-max="4" title="Max 4 per habituation session per UWA">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitGorillarwanda">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_gorilla_rwanda" value="gorilla_tracking_rwanda">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="gorilla_tracking_rwanda">Gorilla Tracking (Rwanda) — $1,500</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_gorilla_rwanda" value="1" min="1" max="8" data-uwa-max="8" title="Max 8 per gorilla group per RDB">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitChimp">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_chimp" value="chimp_tracking">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="chimp_tracking">Chimp Tracking — $250</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_chimp" value="1" min="1" max="6" data-uwa-max="6" title="Max 6 per chimp group per UWA">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitChimpHabituation">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_chimp_habituation" value="chimp_habituation">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="chimp_habituation">Chimp Habituation — $400</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_chimp_habituation" value="1" min="1" max="4" data-uwa-max="4" title="Max 4 per chimp habituation session per UWA">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitGolden">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_golden" value="golden_monkey">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="golden_monkey">Golden Monkey — $100</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_golden" value="1" min="1" max="12" data-uwa-max="12" title="Max 12 per golden monkey trek per UWA">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitParkAPlus">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_park_a_plus" value="park_entry_a_plus">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="park_entry_a_plus">Park Entry A+ (Murchison Falls) — $45/day</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_park_a_plus" value="2" min="1" max="14" data-uwa-max="14" title="Days in park (max 14)">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitParkA">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_park_a" value="park_entry_a">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="park_entry_a">Park Entry A (QENP, Kibale, Bwindi, Kidepo, L. Mburo) — $40/day</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_park_a" value="2" min="1" max="14" data-uwa-max="14" title="Days in park (max 14)">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitParkB">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_park_b" value="park_entry_b">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="park_entry_b">Park Entry B (Semuliki, Rwenzori, Mt Elgon) — $35/day</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_park_b" value="2" min="1" max="14" data-uwa-max="14" title="Days in park (max 14)">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitVehicleEntry">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_vehicle_entry" value="vehicle_entry">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="vehicle_entry">Vehicle Entry — 4WD/Tour (Standard Parks) — UGX 30,000/day</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_vehicle_entry" value="2" min="1" max="30" title="Days vehicle is in park">
                    </label>
                    <label class="permit-toggle" id="permitVehicleEntryMurchison">
                      <input type="checkbox" name="permit_vehicle_entry_murchison" value="vehicle_entry_murchison">
                      <span class="permit-toggle-label" data-permit="vehicle_entry_murchison">Vehicle Entry — 4WD/Tour (Murchison Falls) — UGX 40,000/day</span>
                      <input type="number" class="permit-qty" name="qty_vehicle_entry_murchison" value="2" min="1" max="30" title="Days vehicle is in Murchison Falls NP (includes UGX 10,000 surcharge)">
                    </label>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <!-- AI Itinerary Assistant Panel -->
                <div id="aiItineraryPanel" style="display:none" class="mb-5"></div>

                <!-- Activities & Structured Costs -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><path d="M8 2l1.5 3.5L13 6.5l-2.5 2.5.5 3.5L8 11 5 12.5l.5-3.5L3 6.5l3.5-1L8 2z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                    Activities &amp; Structured Costs
                  </div>
                  <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
                    <select id="activityDropdown" class="form-control" style="flex:1;min-width:200px">
                      <option value="">— Select an activity —</option>
                    </select>
                    <button type="button" id="btnAddActivity" class="btn btn-sm btn-primary">Add</button>
                  </div>
                  <div id="activityDropdownHint" style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px">Select an activity then click Add to append it to the quotation</div>
                </div>

                <!-- Extra Costs -->
                <div class="form-section">
                  <div class="form-section-title">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><circle cx="8" cy="8" r="6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M8 5v6M5.5 7.5h5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                    Extra Costs
                  </div>
                  <div id="extraCostsSection"></div>
                  <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap">
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="btnAddExtra">
                      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><path d="M6.5 2v9M2 6.5h9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                      Add Extra Cost
                    </button>
                    <!-- MINOR-32: Visa fee preset -->
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnAddVisaFee" title="Uganda single-entry visa: $50 pp (reduced June 2025 per UTB)">
                      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="3" width="11" height="7" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M1 5.5h11" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/></svg>
                      + Visa Fee ($50 pp)
                    </button>
                    <!-- MINOR-32: Airport transfer preset -->
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnAddAirportTransfer" title="Entebbe airport return transfer (approx.)">
                      + Airport Transfer
                    </button>
                    <!-- Car Park Entry Fee preset -->
                    <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" onclick="window.TRVE.addCarParkFee()" title="Add a daily car park/game drive entry fee">
                      <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="3" width="11" height="8" rx="1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2"/><path d="M3.5 9V6.5h5V9" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.2" stroke-linecap="round"/><circle cx="3.5" cy="9.5" r=".8" fill="currentColor"/><circle cx="9.5" cy="9.5" r=".8" fill="currentColor"/></svg>
                      + Car Park Fee
                    </button>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div style="padding-top: var(--space-4); border-top: 1px solid var(--surface-border); display: flex; justify-content: flex-end;">
                  <button type="submit" class="btn btn-primary btn-lg">
                    <svg width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 16 16" fill="none"><rect x="2" y="3" width="12" height="10" rx="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M2 7h12" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M6 11h1M9 11h1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                    Calculate Price
                  </button>
                </div>

              </form>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Right: Results -->
          <div id="pricingResultsPanel" aria-live="polite">
            <div class="empty-state card" style="min-height: 300px;">
              <div class="empty-icon">
                <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><rect x="3" y="4" width="22" height="20" rx="2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M3 11h22" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M9 16h4M15 16h4M9 20h2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
              </div>
              <div class="empty-title">Awaiting Calculation</div>
              <div class="empty-text">Fill in the inputs and click Calculate Price to see a full breakdown with TMSF markup.</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 5: QUOTATION VIEWER
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-quotations" aria-label="Quotations">
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title">Quotations</span>
            <a class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" onclick="window.TRVE && window.TRVE.navigate('pricing')" style="cursor:pointer;">
              <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M7 2v10M2 7h10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
              Generate New
            </a>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding: 0;">
            <div id="quotationsTableWrap">
              <div class="empty-state">
                <div class="empty-icon">
                  <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><path d="M18 3H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v18a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V9l-5-6z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M18 3v6h5M10 17h8M10 21h5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                </div>
                <div class="empty-title">No Quotations Yet</div>
                <div class="empty-text">Use the Pricing Calculator to create your first quotation. Generated quotes will appear here.</div>
                <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="window.TRVE.navigate('pricing')">Go to Pricing Calculator</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 5b: INVOICES & VOUCHERS
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-invoices" aria-label="Invoices &amp; Vouchers">
        <!-- Tab bar -->
        <div class="inv-tabs" id="invTabs">
          <button class="inv-tab active" data-invtab="invoices">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M8 1H3a1 1 0 00-1 1v10a1 1 0 001 1h8a1 1 0 001-1V5l-4-4z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M8 1v4h4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M4.5 7h5M4.5 9.5h3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
            Invoices
          </button>
          <button class="inv-tab" data-invtab="vouchers">
            <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><rect x="1" y="3" width="12" height="8" rx="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3"/><path d="M1 6h12M4 3V2M10 3V2M4 11v1M10 11v1" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
            Vouchers
          </button>
        </div>

        <!-- Invoices panel -->
        <div id="invPanelInvoices" class="inv-panel">
          <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
              <span class="card-title">Tax Invoices</span>
              <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Generated from confirmed bookings</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body" style="padding:0">
              <div id="invoicesTableWrap">
                <div class="empty-state">
                  <div class="empty-icon">
                    <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><path d="M18 3H7a2 2 0 00-2 2v18a2 2 0 002 2h14a2 2 0 002-2V9l-5-6z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M18 3v6h5M10 17h8M10 21h5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                  </div>
                  <div class="empty-title">No Invoices Yet</div>
                  <div class="empty-text">Open a confirmed booking in the Pipeline and click "Generate Invoice".</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Vouchers panel -->
        <div id="invPanelVouchers" class="inv-panel" style="display:none">
          <div class="card">
            <div class="card-header">
              <span class="card-title">Supplier Vouchers</span>
              <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Auto-generated from booking pricing data</span>
            </div>
            <div class="card-body" style="padding:0">
              <div id="vouchersTableWrap">
                <div class="empty-state">
                  <div class="empty-icon">
                    <svg width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none"><rect x="2" y="6" width="24" height="16" rx="2.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"/><path d="M2 12h24M8 6V4M20 6V4M8 22v2M20 22v2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
                  </div>
                  <div class="empty-title">No Vouchers Yet</div>
                  <div class="empty-text">Open a confirmed booking in the Pipeline and click "Generate Vouchers".</div>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW: REPORTS & ANALYTICS
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-reports" aria-label="Reports">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Reports &amp; Analytics</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Pipeline metrics &middot; Revenue analysis &middot; Team performance</p>
        </div>
        <div id="reportsContent">
          <div class="card" style="padding:var(--space-6);text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted)">Loading reports…</div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           VIEW 6: SHEETS SYNC PANEL
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-sync" aria-label="Sheets Sync">
        <div id="syncPanelContent">
          <!-- Rendered by renderSyncView() -->
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- T3: Finance Tools — Bank Charges Calculator -->
      <section class="view" id="view-tools" aria-label="Finance Tools">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Finance Tools</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Live market data &middot; Bank charges &middot; Transfer gross-up &middot; Stanbic &amp; Absa tariffs</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Live Market Data Panel -->
        <div class="card mb-5" id="marketDataPanel">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title">Live Market Data</span>
            <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Auto-fetched · Override available</span>
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnRefreshMarketData" style="margin-left:var(--space-3)" title="Refresh all market data">
              <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><path d="M1 6.5a5.5 5.5 0 0110.5-2.3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M12 1v4H8" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/><path d="M12 6.5a5.5 5.5 0 01-10.5 2.3" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
              Refresh
            </button>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
            <div id="marketDataRows" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:var(--space-3)">
              <!-- Populated by _renderMarketDataPanel() -->
              <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:60%"></div>
              <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:80%"></div>
              <div class="skeleton skeleton-text" style="width:50%"></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Bank Charges Calculator -->
        <div class="card mb-5">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title">Bank Charges Calculator</span>
            <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Fees below already include 15% excise duty</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:var(--space-5)">
              <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="bankTabStanbic">Stanbic Business</button>
              <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="bankTabAbsa">Absa Business</button>
            </div>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-5)">
              <div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label" for="bankTxType">Transaction Type</label>
                  <select class="form-control" id="bankTxType">
                    <option value="">— Select —</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" id="bankAmountGroup" style="display:none">
                  <label class="form-label" for="bankTxAmount">Transaction Amount (UGX)</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="number" id="bankTxAmount" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 5000000">
                </div>
                <div class="form-group" id="bankEntriesGroup" style="display:none">
                  <label class="form-label" for="bankTxEntries">Number of Entries</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="number" id="bankTxEntries" min="1" value="1">
                </div>
              </div>
              <div id="bankChargeResult" style="background:var(--bg-surface);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-4);display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;min-height:120px">
                <div style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted)">Select a transaction type to calculate</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- International Transfer Gross-Up Calculator -->
        <div class="card mb-5 mt-5">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title">International Transfer Gross-Up Calculator</span>
            <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Ensure company receives exact invoiced amount</span>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
            <p style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:var(--space-4)">
              Calculate the gross amount the client must send so the net amount received equals the invoice total, after all bank deductions.
            </p>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-5)">
              <div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label" for="gtInvoiceTotal">Invoice Total (USD) <span style="color:var(--danger)">*</span></label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtInvoiceTotal" min="0" placeholder="e.g. 5000">
                </div>

                <!-- Auto-populated fee fields with source transparency -->
                <div style="background:var(--bg-subtle);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-3);margin-bottom:var(--space-3)">
                  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <span style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.05em">Fee Assumptions</span>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <span id="gtBenchmarkSource" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted)">Loading…</span>
                      <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnLoadBenchmark" style="font-size:10px;padding:2px 8px;height:22px">Load defaults</button>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <label class="form-label" style="font-size:11px" for="gtReceivingFlat">Receiving Bank Fee — Flat (USD)</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtReceivingFlat" min="0" value="15" placeholder="e.g. 15" style="flex:1">
                      <span class="gt-auto-badge" data-field="gtReceivingFlat" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <label class="form-label" style="font-size:11px" for="gtReceivingPct">Receiving Bank Fee — % of amount</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtReceivingPct" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" value="0" placeholder="e.g. 0.5" style="flex:1">
                      <span class="gt-auto-badge" data-field="gtReceivingPct" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <label class="form-label" style="font-size:11px" for="gtIntermediary">Intermediary / Correspondent Bank Fee (USD)</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtIntermediary" min="0" value="25" placeholder="e.g. 25" style="flex:1">
                      <span class="gt-auto-badge" data-field="gtIntermediary" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                    <label class="form-label" style="font-size:11px" for="gtSenderPct">Sender Bank Fee — % (charged on sender side)</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtSenderPct" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" value="0" placeholder="e.g. 1.5" style="flex:1">
                      <span class="gt-auto-badge" data-field="gtSenderPct" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group" style="margin-bottom:0">
                    <label class="form-label" style="font-size:11px" for="gtSenderFlat">Sender Bank Fee — Flat (USD)</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtSenderFlat" min="0" value="0" placeholder="e.g. 30" style="flex:1">
                      <span class="gt-auto-badge" data-field="gtSenderFlat" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div style="border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding-top:var(--space-3);margin-top:var(--space-3)">
                  <label style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);display:block;margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">Currency Conversion (optional)</label>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="gtExchangeRate">Exchange Rate (1 USD = X foreign currency)</label>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;align-items:center">
                      <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtExchangeRate" min="0" step="0.0001" placeholder="e.g. 0.92 for EUR" style="flex:1">
                      <span id="gtExRateBadge" style="display:none;font-size:9px;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:3px;background:var(--success);color:#fff;white-space:nowrap">auto</span>
                    </div>
                    <div id="gtExRateSource" style="font-size:10px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px"></div>
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="gtClientCurrency">Client Currency Code</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="text" id="gtClientCurrency" maxlength="4" placeholder="e.g. EUR, GBP, NOK">
                  </div>
                  <div class="form-group">
                    <label class="form-label" for="gtConversionFeePct">FX Conversion Fee (%)</label>
                    <input class="form-control" type="number" id="gtConversionFeePct" min="0" max="10" step="0.1" value="0" placeholder="e.g. 1.5">
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="form-group">
                  <label class="form-label" for="gtApprovedBy">Confirmed by (your name)</label>
                  <input class="form-control" type="text" id="gtApprovedBy" placeholder="e.g. Desire">
                </div>
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary w-full" id="btnCalculateTransfer">Calculate Required Transfer Amount</button>
              </div>

              <div id="gtResult" style="background:var(--bg-subtle);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-5);display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:var(--space-3)">
                <div style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;padding:var(--space-6) 0">
                  Fill in the invoice total and fee assumptions, then click Calculate.
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Audit log of calculations -->
            <div style="margin-top:var(--space-5)">
              <div style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:0.06em;margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">
                Calculation Audit Log
                <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnClearTransferLog" style="margin-left:8px;font-size:var(--text-xs)">Clear</button>
              </div>
              <div id="gtAuditLog" style="max-height:240px;overflow-y:auto;font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-secondary)">
                <div style="color:var(--text-muted);font-style:italic">No calculations yet.</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Quick Reference Table -->
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title" id="bankRefTitle">Stanbic Business &mdash; Fee Reference</span>
            <span class="text-xs text-muted" style="margin-left:auto">Before excise duty unless marked</span>
          </div>
          <div style="overflow-x:auto" id="bankRefTable">
            <!-- Rendered by renderBankRefTable() -->
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Lodge Rate Management -->
      <section class="view" id="view-lodges" aria-label="Lodge Rate Management">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Lodge Rates</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Manage partner lodge rates &middot; Add, edit or remove accommodation pricing</p>
        </div>

        <!-- Add / Edit Form -->
        <div class="card mb-5" id="lodgeFormCard">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title" id="lodgeFormTitle">Add New Lodge Rate</span>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="lodgeFormCancelBtn" style="margin-left:auto;display:none">Cancel</button>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-4)">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Lodge Name <span class="required">*</span></label>
                <input class="form-control" type="text" id="lf_name" placeholder="e.g. Gorilla Safari Lodge">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Room Type <span class="required">*</span></label>
                <input class="form-control" type="text" id="lf_room_type" placeholder="e.g. Double Room">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Country</label>
                <select class="form-control" id="lf_country">
                  <option value="Uganda">Uganda</option>
                  <option value="Rwanda">Rwanda</option>
                  <option value="Kenya">Kenya</option>
                  <option value="Tanzania">Tanzania</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Location / Area</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="text" id="lf_location" placeholder="e.g. Bwindi — Buhoma">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Rack Rate (USD/night)</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="number" id="lf_rack" min="0" step="0.01" placeholder="0.00">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Net Rate (USD/night)</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="number" id="lf_net" min="0" step="0.01" placeholder="Leave blank = 70% of rack">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Meal Plan</label>
                <select class="form-control" id="lf_meal">
                  <option value="Full Board">Full Board</option>
                  <option value="Half Board">Half Board</option>
                  <option value="Bed &amp; Breakfast">Bed &amp; Breakfast</option>
                  <option value="Room Only">Room Only</option>
                </select>
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Valid From</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="date" id="lf_valid_from" value="2025-01-01">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Valid To</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="date" id="lf_valid_to" value="2026-12-31">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="margin-top:var(--space-2)">
              <label class="form-label">Notes</label>
              <input class="form-control" type="text" id="lf_notes" placeholder="e.g. Luxury, Nile views, Single supplement">
            </div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);margin-top:var(--space-4)">
              <button class="btn btn-primary" id="lodgeSaveBtn">
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M2 7l4 4 6-6" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
                Save Lodge Rate
              </button>
              <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="lodgeClearBtn">Clear</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Search & Filter -->
        <div class="card mb-4">
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-4);display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
            <input class="form-control" type="search" id="lodgeSearch" placeholder="Search lodge name or location..." style="flex:1;min-width:200px">
            <select class="form-control" id="lodgeFilterCountry" style="width:140px">
              <option value="">All Countries</option>
              <option value="Uganda">Uganda</option>
              <option value="Rwanda">Rwanda</option>
            </select>
            <span class="text-xs text-muted" id="lodgeCount"></span>
            <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="btnRefreshFromGmail" type="button">
              <svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 13 13" fill="none"><path d="M2 6.5a4.5 4.5 0 014.5-4.5A4.5 4.5 0 0111 6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M11 6.5a4.5 4.5 0 01-4.5 4.5A4.5 4.5 0 012 6.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.4" stroke-linecap="round"/><path d="M9 4.5l2-2 2 2" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.3" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
              Refresh from Gmail
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Gmail Rate Import Panel (shown on demand) -->
        <div id="gmailRateImportPanel" style="display:none" class="card mb-4">
          <div class="card-header">
            <span class="card-title">Import Lodge Rates from Email</span>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnCloseGmailPanel" style="margin-left:auto">&times;</button>
          </div>
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
            <p style="font-size:var(--text-sm);color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:var(--space-4)">
              Enter the lodge rates received by email. The system will record the email source date alongside each rate so you can always see where pricing came from and how recent it is.
            </p>
            <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:var(--space-4);margin-bottom:var(--space-4)">
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Email Subject</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="text" id="gi_subject" placeholder="e.g. STO rates 2026">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Email Date <span class="required">*</span></label>
                <input class="form-control" type="date" id="gi_email_date">
              </div>
              <div class="form-group">
                <label class="form-label">Sender</label>
                <input class="form-control" type="text" id="gi_sender" placeholder="e.g. reservations@lodge.com">
              </div>
            </div>
            <div id="gi_rates_list" style="display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:var(--space-3)">
              <!-- Rate rows added dynamically -->
            </div>
            <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="btnAddGmailRate" style="margin-top:var(--space-3)">
              <svg width="12" height="12" viewBox="0 0 12 12" fill="none"><path d="M6 1v10M1 6h10" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/></svg>
              Add Another Room Type
            </button>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);margin-top:var(--space-4)">
              <button type="button" class="btn btn-primary" id="btnSaveGmailRates">Import Rates</button>
              <button type="button" class="btn btn-ghost" id="btnCloseGmailPanel2">Cancel</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Lodge Table -->
        <div class="card">
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:0;overflow-x:auto">
            <table class="pipeline-table" id="lodgeTable">
              <thead>
                <tr>
                  <th>Lodge Name</th>
                  <th>Room Type</th>
                  <th>Country / Area</th>
                  <th style="text-align:right">Rack Rate</th>
                  <th style="text-align:right">Net Rate</th>
                  <th>Meal Plan</th>
                  <th>Valid</th>
                  <th>Rate Source</th>
                  <th>Notes</th>
                  <th style="width:80px"></th>
                </tr>
              </thead>
              <tbody id="lodgeTableBody">
                <tr><td colspan="9" style="text-align:center;padding:32px;color:var(--text-muted)">Loading lodges...</td></tr>
              </tbody>
            </table>
          </div>
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- Phase 2: Client Profiles -->
      <section class="view" id="view-clients" aria-label="Client Profiles">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Client Profiles</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Persistent client records &middot; Preferences, history, and lifetime value</p>
        </div>
        <div class="card mb-4">
          <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-4)">
            <div style="display:flex;gap:var(--space-3);align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
              <input type="text" class="form-control" id="clientSearchInput"
                     placeholder="Search by name, email, or phone&hellip;"
                     style="flex:1;min-width:220px">
              <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="clientSearchBtn">Search</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="clientsListView">
          <!-- Rendered by JS -->
        </div>
        <div id="clientDetailView" style="display:none">
          <!-- Rendered by JS when a client is selected -->
        </div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           PHASE 3: VIEW — TASKS
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-tasks" aria-label="Task Management">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Tasks</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">All open follow-up tasks across bookings</p>
        </div>
        <div id="tasksViewBody" style="padding:8px 0"></div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           PHASE 3: VIEW — MANIFESTS
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-manifests" aria-label="Manifests">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Manifests</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Arrival &amp; departure manifests by date range</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:flex-end;margin-bottom:16px;flex-wrap:wrap">
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0">
            <label class="form-label">From</label>
            <input class="form-control" type="date" id="manifestDateFrom" style="height:36px">
          </div>
          <div class="form-group" style="margin:0">
            <label class="form-label">To</label>
            <input class="form-control" type="date" id="manifestDateTo" style="height:36px">
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" id="manifestSearchBtn">Search</button>
        </div>
        <div id="manifestsTableWrap"></div>
      </section>

      <!-- ================================================
           PHASE 3: VIEW — FLEET
           ================================================ -->
      <section class="view" id="view-fleet" aria-label="Fleet Calendar">
        <div class="view-header">
          <h1 class="view-title">Fleet</h1>
          <p class="view-subtitle">Vehicle availability by week</p>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin-bottom:16px">
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="fleetPrevWeek">&lt; Prev week</button>
          <span id="fleetWeekLabel" style="font-weight:600;font-size:13px"></span>
          <button class="btn btn-secondary btn-sm" id="fleetNextWeek">Next week &gt;</button>
        </div>
        <div id="fleetCalendarWrap" style="overflow-x:auto"></div>
      </section>

    </main>

    <!-- Footer -->
    <footer class="app-footer">
      <span class="text-xs text-muted">The Rift Valley Explorer &copy; 2026 &mdash; Bucket List Adventures Into The Heart Of Africa</span>
      <a href="https://www.perplexity.ai/computer" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">Created with Perplexity Computer</a>
    </footer>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Quotation Client Details Modal (MAJOR-19) -->
<div id="quotationModal" class="modal-overlay hidden" role="dialog" aria-modal="true" aria-labelledby="quotationModalTitle">
  <div class="modal-content card" style="max-width:460px;width:90%;max-height:90vh;overflow:auto;">
    <div class="card-header">
      <span class="card-title" id="quotationModalTitle">Quotation Details</span>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost btn-sm" id="quotationModalClose" aria-label="Close" style="margin-left:auto">&times;</button>
    </div>
    <div class="card-body" style="padding:var(--space-5)">
      <div class="form-group mb-4">
        <label class="form-label" for="qmClientName">Client Name <span class="required">*</span></label>
        <input class="form-control" type="text" id="qmClientName" placeholder="Jane Smith">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-4">
        <label class="form-label" for="qmClientEmail">Client Email</label>
        <input class="form-control" type="email" id="qmClientEmail" placeholder="jane@example.com">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-4">
        <label class="form-label" for="qmBookingRef">Booking Reference</label>
        <input class="form-control" type="text" id="qmBookingRef" placeholder="TRVE-2026-001">
      </div>
      <div class="form-group mb-4">
        <label class="form-label" for="qmValidDays">Valid for (days)</label>
        <input class="form-control" type="number" id="qmValidDays" value="14" min="1" max="90">
      </div>
      <!-- Auto-calculated bank charges (populated from price calculation) -->
      <div id="qmBankChargesBlock" style="background:#edfaf5;border:1px solid #6ee7c7;border-radius:var(--radius-md);padding:var(--space-3);margin-bottom:var(--space-4)">
        <div style="font-size:var(--text-xs);font-weight:700;color:#0d7a5f;margin-bottom:var(--space-2)">Transfer Fees (auto-calculated)</div>
        <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr auto;gap:3px var(--space-3);font-size:var(--text-xs);align-items:center">
          <span style="color:var(--text-secondary)">Invoice Total</span>
          <span id="qmInvoiceTotal" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right">—</span>
          <span style="color:var(--text-secondary)">Estimated bank charges</span>
          <span id="qmEstBankCharges" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right;color:var(--danger)">—</span>
          <span style="font-weight:600">Client must send</span>
          <span id="qmClientMustSend" style="font-family:var(--font-mono);text-align:right;font-weight:700">—</span>
        </div>
        <div id="qmBankChargesNote" style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:var(--space-2)">Pre-filled from the price calculation.</div>
      </div>
      <!-- Add Bank Charges to Invoice -->
      <div class="form-group mb-4">
        <label class="form-label" for="qmIncludeBankCharges">Add Bank Charges to Invoice?</label>
        <select class="form-control" id="qmIncludeBankCharges">
          <option value="yes">Yes — include bank charges in invoice instructions</option>
          <option value="no">No — invoice only the base amount</option>
        </select>
        <div style="font-size:var(--text-xs);color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px">When "Yes": invoice shows charges and total to send. Transfer amount is always stored internally.</div>
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-gold w-full" id="qmSubmitBtn">
        <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 14 14" fill="none"><path d="M7 1v9M3 6l4 4 4-4" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
        Generate Quotation PDF
      </button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<script src="app.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```

---

## `styles.css` — Stylesheet (1756 lines)

```css
/* ============================================================
   TRVE Booking Hub — styles.css
   The Rift Valley Explorer · Safari Operations Dashboard
   ============================================================ */

/* ── Design Tokens ─────────────────────────────────────────── */
:root {
  /* Brand */
  --brand-green:       #0D5E4F;
  --brand-green-dark:  #094a3e;
  --brand-green-light: #e8f4f1;
  --brand-gold:        #C8963E;
  --brand-gold-dark:   #a97830;
  --brand-gold-light:  #fdf3e3;

  /* Backgrounds */
  --bg-base:    #f4f6f5;
  --bg-surface: #ffffff;
  --bg-subtle:  #f9fafb;

  /* Borders */
  --surface-border: #e2e8e6;
  --border:         #e2e8e6;
  --border-focus:   #0D5E4F;

  /* Text */
  --text-base:    #1a2e29;
  --text-muted:   #6b7e79;
  --text-subtle:  #9bada8;
  --text-inverse: #ffffff;

  /* Sidebar */
  --sidebar-bg:     #0D5E4F;
  --sidebar-width:  220px;
  --sidebar-collapsed-width: 56px;

  /* Spacing */
  --space-1: 4px;
  --space-2: 8px;
  --space-3: 12px;
  --space-4: 16px;
  --space-5: 20px;
  --space-6: 24px;
  --space-8: 32px;

  /* Typography */
```
